original_text:
### Layout Principles
- Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.
- "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.
- Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**
- Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

relations.note: Background alternation and single-focal-point hierarchy jointly prevent adjacent sections from visually merging or becoming cluttered.
The canonical patient-centered block pattern supports the show-don't-tell approach to content presentation.

quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered.
Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Keep section hierarchy clear and direct attention without visual clutter.
rules.rule_text: Sections use generous white space and remain clean, never cluttered. Limit each section to one focal point, using contrast to direct attention to its single most important element.

quotes: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Make dense content more approachable and visually communicative.
rules.rule_text: Follow “Show, don't tell”: break up text walls with imagery and icons.

quotes: alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern)
alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.
[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

rules.intent: Preserve topic separation and enable safe assembly sequencing.
rules.rule_text: Use color blocks to delineate topics, alternating White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#e6f0f9), Golden Sand (#fef1c8), or gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections do not visually merge. [GENERAL]: section designers must declare each section's background color in component metadata so assemblers can avoid identical adjacent backgrounds.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern
reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials

rules.intent: Maintain a consistent, patient-centered visual and messaging framework.
rules.rule_text: Use the canonical content-block pattern of a bold headline, simple benefit statements, and a patient quote. The patient brochure is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone across all LISRAYA materials.
